sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; function Contact({ data }) { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', email: '', message: '' }); const handleChange = (e) => { const { name, value } = e.target; setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: value })); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Create mailto link const mailtoLink = `mailto:${data.email}?subject=Portfolio Inquiry from ${formData.name}&body=${encodeURIComponent(formData.message)}`; window.location.href = mailtoLink; setFormData({ name: '', email: '', message: '' }); }; if (!data) return null; return (

Get in Touch

Contact Information

Email

{data.email}

Phone

{data.phone}

LinkedIn

Connect with me
); } export default Contact;
